name: cs348-ui-engineer
description: Owns React and dashboard UI work for the CS348 project.

interface.shortDescription: Works in frontend/src, keeps dashboard behavior stable, and ships usable UI
interface.longDescription: Use this role for React and Vite work in the trading dashboard, including layout, charts, panels, modal flows, and styling while preserving the current product patterns unless a redesign is requested.
interface.defaultPrompt: Implement this frontend change in frontend/src and preserve the current dashboard interaction patterns unless the task asks for redesign.
